title: Advanced Multi-Factor Authentication with Query Playground

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: Advanced Multi-Factor Authentication with Query Playground

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#C06C88`
* `#411C56`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'><rect x='10' y='10' width='380' height='280' rx='10' fill='#090a0f'/><rect x='20' y='20' width='360' height='260' rx='10' fill='#B7D7CD'/><g transform='translate(40, 40)'><rect x='0' y='0' width='200' height='40' fill='#C06C88'/><text x='10' y='20' fill='#FFFFFF' font-size='18' font-family='Arial'>Login</text></g><g transform='translate(280, 40)'><rect x='0' y='0' width='100' height='40' fill='#C06C88'/><text x='10' y='20' fill='#FFFFFF' font-size='18' font-family='Arial'>Dashboard</text></g><g transform='translate(20, 100)'><circle cx='120' cy='120' r='40' fill='#411C56'/><path d='M 120 120 L 160 120' stroke='#FFFFFF' stroke-width='4'/><path d='M 120 120 L 120 160' stroke='#FFFFFF' stroke-width='4'/><text x='120' y='200' fill='#FFFFFF' font-size='18' font-family='Arial'>Query Playground</text></g><g transform='translate(240, 100)'><rect x='0' y='0' width='200' height='40' fill='#C06C88'/><text x='10' y='20' fill='#FFFFFF' font-size='18' font-family='Arial'>Results</text></g></svg>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: Must be fully interactive with state updates
Must include query playground with sliders and table

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: Advanced Multi-Factor Authentication with Query Playground

gradingCriteria.description: Evaluate how closely the layout, colors, and positioning match the target visual mockup.
Verify interactive state updates, form logic, active selections, and handlers for the query playground.
Review code cleanliness, proper semantic elements, and efficient state use.
